ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park or site */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the park or historical site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the park (e.g., city, state) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the park (e.g., National Park, National Historical Park) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the park */,
  "description" TEXT /* Comprehensive description of the site, including historical and recreational significance */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the park */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the park */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the park administration */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the park administration */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the park */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park visited */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of arrival at the park */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of departure from the park */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor making the reservation */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park related to the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of reservation (e.g., tour, accommodation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reservation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reservation */,
  "num_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the reservation */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests or notes for the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor providing feedback */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park being reviewed */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the visitor (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the visitor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., facilities, staff, activities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the administrator */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park managed by the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park being analyzed */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year (1-12) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being collected */,
  "visitor_count" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors during the month */,
  "feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries received */,
  "social_media_followers" INTEGER /* Number of social media followers for the park */,
  "website_traffic" INTEGER /* Number of website visitors for the park */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park associated with the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered (if applicable) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the promotional image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Park Ranger, Site Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park associated with the social media account */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)
